vote.text: Amendment SA 3680 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.

action.text: Amendment SA 3680 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Coons. (consideration: CR S5475-5476) To make a technical correction.
Senate amendment proposed (on the floor): Amendment SA 3680 proposed by Senator Thune for Senator Coons.
Senate amendment agreed to: Amendment SA 3680 agreed to in Senate by Unanimous Consent.
